# AgentSpan

> The Web Access Gateway for AI Agents. Read any URL as clean text and search
> 14 platforms (web, GitHub, YouTube, Reddit, Twitter/X, Bilibili, Hacker News,
> V2EX, XiaoHongShu, LinkedIn, Xueqiu, Xiaoyuzhou podcasts, Exa web search, RSS)
> through one REST API, CLI, MCP server, and Python SDK.

AgentSpan is both a runtime gateway (it serves reads/searches behind a REST API
with caching, auth, and multi-tenancy) and a capability layer (it installs and
health-checks the upstream tools, extracts cookies, and registers an agent skill).

## Quick start
- `agentspan doctor` — see which channels are healthy and the active backend
- `agentspan install --channels all` — install upstream tools (gh, yt-dlp, mcporter, OpenCLI, ...)
- `agentspan config from-browser chrome` — import login cookies (Cookie-Editor flow)
- `agentspan skill install` — register the SKILL.md for Claude Code / Cursor / agents
- `agentspan serve --port 8080` — start the gateway

## Interfaces
- REST: POST /api/v1/read (smart, auto-detect channel), GET /api/v1/channels/{name}/search
- MCP: the `agentspan-mcp` binary (stdio) exposes 16 tools (web_read, web_search, github_read, youtube_subtitles, reddit_search, hn_search, doctor, ...)
- CLI: install, uninstall, setup, doctor, watch, config, skill, update, serve
- SDK: `pip install agentspan` (async httpx client)

## Docs
- docs/CLAUDE.md — development context
- docs/troubleshooting.md — common failures and fixes
- docs/cookie-export.md — importing login cookies
- docs/guides/setup-twitter.md, docs/guides/setup-xiaohongshu.md — per-platform setup
